lines.lyrics: Everyone's getting smarter, lead me to water
Or carry me home
Ask me whatever you wanna
And I'm gonna tell you, you'll never be alone
When you're in my pocket, I feel lost
Thought I just had you but now you're off
I'll be with you always, you light my face
You're the new god of the human race
Turn on whenever I touch you
You go to sleep in a dream
The heavens float up above you
And you're with me downstairs in my arms while you gleam
When you're in my pocket, I feel lost
Thought I just had you but now you're off
I'll be with you always, you light my face
You're the new god of the human race
You showed me the way, it gets easier every day
But now it seems I will never think on my own
It's a simpler understanding
Not too much demanding of me but my time
Now it seems there is no thunder
Should I dare to wonder what they're doing outside
When you're in my pocket, I feel lost
Thought I just had you but now you're off
I'll be with you always, you light my face
You're the new god of the human race
